content.text: Release history for Nightjar. Each release includes the version number, release date, and summary of changes. For full details, visit the GitHub Releases page.
This page loads the latest releases automatically from the GitHub API. If releases don't appear, check your internet connection or visit github.com/NiyaNagi/Nightjar/releases directly.
v1.8.15 — Fix P2P Auth Token Mismatch on Mobile (Issue #23)

File downloads from native desktop to mobile web failed with auth_token_mismatch. Root cause: on page reload, FileTransferProvider mounted before the in-memory keychain was restored from persisted workspace data. It fell back to a random per-browser sessionKey, producing a bogus HMAC that poisoned the server's first-write-wins auth token map.

items: Fix: FileTransferProvider workspaceKey prop no longer falls back to random sessionKey (passes null instead)
Fix: FileTransferContext defers P2P topic join until real workspace key is available
Fix: PeerManager resets currentWorkspaceId on bootstrap failure (enables clean retry)
Fix: WorkspaceContext defers setCurrentWorkspaceId until all keychains are restored from storage
Tests: 39 new tests; 166 suites, 5,349 tests passing

content.text: v1.8.14 — Fix File Download on Mobile (Issue #21)

File downloads from desktop to mobile failed with 'Connected peers: 0'. Root cause: the signaling server returned unknown_type for the identity message, and the client's error handler blindly rejected the pending joinTopic promise — killing peer discovery before it started.

items: Fix: Server now handles 'identity' and 'pong' messages silently (no more unknown_type errors)
Fix: Client only rejects joinTopic for topic-fatal errors (auth_token_mismatch, room_requires_auth, etc.)
Fix: Identity message deferred until after joinTopic on reconnect (eliminates race condition)
Tests: 40 new tests; 165 suites, 5,310 tests passing

content.text: v1.8.11 — Workspace Data Persistence on Mobile

Critical fix for workspace data disappearing on mobile after the app is backgrounded or reopened. Workspace metadata (document list, folders, members, settings) was only synced over the network — when WebSocket hadn't reconnected yet, users saw an empty workspace. Now persisted to encrypted IndexedDB so data is available immediately on app reopen.

items: Fix: Workspace metadata Y.Doc now persisted to encrypted IndexedDB on web/mobile (was network-only)
Fix: Request navigator.storage.persist() on startup to prevent iOS/Android storage eviction
Tests: 6 new tests; 164 suites, 5,270 tests passing

content.text: v1.8.10 — Fix File Sharing Auth & Mobile Reconnect Loop (Issues #18, #19)

Root cause fix for file sharing between devices and workspace data persistence on mobile. FileTransferProvider was using a per-browser random key instead of the shared workspace key for HMAC auth, causing auth_token_mismatch and 0 peers. Additionally, y-websocket infinite reconnect loops on mobile (Issue #19) are stopped via 4403 detection and a rapid-disconnect circuit breaker.

items: Fix: FileTransferProvider now uses shared workspace key (not per-browser sessionKey) for P2P auth
Fix: y-websocket 4403 close code now stops reconnect loop (was cycling every 100ms forever)
Fix: Rapid-disconnect circuit breaker kills provider after 5 fast reconnect cycles
Fix: Retry limits now apply to ALL workspaces including mobile PWA (removed isRemote guard)
Fix: WebSocketTransport.joinTopic() now properly rejects on server auth errors
Fix: BootstrapManager passes auth credentials to bootstrap peers
Tests: 20 new tests; 164 suites, 5,264 tests passing

content.text: v1.8.9 — Share Link Race Fix & File Download Retry (Issue #18)

Two user-facing bugs persisted after v1.8.7: clicking a share link while an identity was locked or being selected silently lost the link, and file downloads failed immediately with 'Connected peers: 0' instead of retrying. This release fixes both bugs, adds automatic workspace switching when re-joining an existing workspace via share link, and makes file downloads resilient with retry + re-bootstrap.

items: Fix: Share link race condition — links stored in sessionStorage before URL fragment overwrite
Fix: Identity selection now processes pending share links (handleIdentitySelected wired to processPendingShareLink)
Feature: Automatic workspace switching via share links with UX toast
Fix: File download retry with exponential backoff (2s → 4s → 8s, up to 3 retries per chunk)
Fix: One-shot re-bootstrap when 0 peers connected in FileTransferContext
Tests: 52 new tests; 163 suites, 5,244 tests passing
